title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Gera Developments - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Gera Developments - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Gera Developments, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!
